---
title: "Experiments"
---

All laboratory experiments performed by Niel Bauer. The most recent experiments are listed first.

[OSPR RNA extraction 05212026](ELN_entries/OSPR_extraction_05212026.qmd)

[BLVU RNA Extraction 05142026](ELN_entries/BLVU_RNAext_05142026.qmd)

[BLVU RNA Extraction 05122026](ELN_entries/BLVU_RNAext_05122026.qmd)

[RNA Extraction w/ 5mm bead](ELN_entries/5mm_bead_RNA_extraction.qmd)

[LN2 RNA extraction 04343036](https://github.com/JAHarvey/HarveyLabNotebook/blob/fb40f45343b194b77632679244c2c7824038e884/Niel%20Bauer%20Lab%20Notebook/LN2_RNA_extraction_04232026.qmd)

[Turkey DNA Extraction 03092026](https://github.com/JAHarvey/HarveyLabNotebook/blob/fb40f45343b194b77632679244c2c7824038e884/Niel%20Bauer%20Lab%20Notebook/Turkey_DNA_extraction_03092026.qmd)

[RNA extraction practice](https://github.com/JAHarvey/HarveyLabNotebook/blob/fb40f45343b194b77632679244c2c7824038e884/Niel%20Bauer%20Lab%20Notebook/RNA_extraction_practice.qmd)
